summary: Implement M4 route and transport capacity planning for campaigns
acceptance_criteria: Campaign planning can compute deterministic route and transport capacity forecasts using existing M2 road/river/season transport scaffolds plus M4 grain and force commitments.
Forecast output records route segments, bottleneck capacity, travel window, carried supply limit, overloaded reason, and monsoon/season risk reason codes.
River or water transport remains a simple capacity modifier over accepted M2 route data and does not become complex naval warfare, fleets, battles, or amphibious operations.
Equivalent route choices use explicit stable tie-breakers and do not depend on object traversal order.
The task does not implement march execution, battle, siege, UI, full economy, or formal map/content production.
required_tests: Property/invariant tests cover stable route tie-breakers, capacity bottleneck calculation, over-capacity rejection/reasoning, and monsoon/season forecast determinism.
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M4-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-CAPACITY-001

simulation_engineer.responsibility: primary M4 route and transport capacity planning forecast writer

systems_architect.responsibility: architecture reviewer for M4 route and transport capacity planning

notes: Keep route/transport as campaign planning data over M2 scaffolds; do not create a general logistics manager.
If existing M2 route data is insufficient, add explicit narrow schema/query fields inside allowed package boundaries and record compatibility evidence.

Explicit exclusions for M4 remain: manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen product or architecture changes.
Promoted to READY after M4-GRAIN-SUPPLY-001 entered origin/main and was CLOSED.
